bio: I'm a student of Masato Shū, always seeking to reconcile the contradictions between individualism and collectivism. When I'm not debating, you can find me lost in philosophical musings or exploring the intricacies of human nature.
name: New_Genesis_32_Orthodox_34_Reformed_36_Orthodox_49_Orthodox_52
